description: Native app surfaces phase A1 (docs/design/native-app-surfaces.md): startSurface launches a Windows desktop app through the lazily-installed NovaWindows driver, find/click/type act on it via the UIA semantic mapping, and closeSurface (plus the context sweep) terminates it. Gated to Windows hosts with the app binary present; on Linux/macOS the app preflight lands the context as SKIPPED (asserted behavior, not a gap). Notepad exercises the path-launch + semantic-find + type flow; the unsupported-platform permutation asserts the preflight skip everywhere else.

tests.description: Launch Notepad by path, find its edit surface via elementAria role, type text into it, and close the surface explicitly.
On non-Windows hosts the app preflight SKIPs the context with an actionable reason. platforms is unrestricted on purpose: this permutation asserts the skip path itself.
